module.name: agent
module.purpose: Agent crate namespace for model/session/task/prompt/step/execution orchestration and the plan hub module. Step owns task-step routing and emits plan events, PlanHub routes plan events and runs plans by reserving step-number blocks and emitting StepEvent::Trigger, the execution module tracks tool executions keyed by execution signature, and task runtime maps execution signatures to step signatures so execution success can complete steps and trigger follow-up execution-analysis model plans.

childModules.name: execution
childModules.purpose: Owns agent-side execution tracking: Execution values keyed by ExecutionSignature and an ExecutionHub that owns an Arc<TaskState> and an execution map to route execution events and report per-signature status.

childModules.name: model
childModules.purpose: Owns agent model backend traits, request/response data, backend errors, and the implemented Deepseek streaming backend. Internal backend implementations expose request directly instead of a send adapter.

childModules.name: plan
childModules.purpose: Owns PlanHub, PlanRecord, PlanStringify, and PlanError for insertion-ordered task plan storage, plan-event routing, step-block reservation, lookup, completion tracking, and current/pending plan text rendering for prompts.

childModules.name: prompt
childModules.purpose: Defines the agent prompt interface, render_template rendering, InitialPrompt, and ExecutionAnalysisPrompt for execution-output analysis.

childModules.name: session
childModules.purpose: Owns Session startup/routing behavior, forwarding Task status/preview and Step events to clients through a matches! filter and routing task, step, execution, and plan events back to the owning Task worker, plus SessionContext snapshots for prompts.

childModules.name: step
childModules.purpose: Owns the top-level agent runtime Step type re-exported by lib.rs; Step holds Arc<TaskState> and owns task-step routing (StepEvent::Trigger/Complete), model-prompt rendering, plan-event emission, and step/model completion handling.

childModules.name: task
childModules.purpose: Owns agent task runtime and TaskState (session context, plan_hub, execution_map, a monotonic step_count allocator, and step queue); step routing lives on Step, plan events route to PlanHub, and task_execution drives execution steps and execution-analysis follow-up plans.
